encode.name: EncodeIdea
encode.purpose: SIML encoder channel — MC encodes concepts from URLs/PDFs/text into SIML terms, and answers questions about SIML.

member_chat.name: member-chat
member_chat.purpose: General member conversation. MC posts announcements here pointing members to #the-tally for daily idea submissions.

the_tally.name: the-tally
the_tally.purpose: Daily idea collection and voting channel — MC posts the call for ideas here; members submit concepts for tomorrow's daemon encounter.

workspace.purpose: Internal workspace channel — MC posts size-check alerts and operational status here.
